title: FolderUpdateArgs
description: Available options for updating a secret folder

folderTypeId.description: The icon to display for the folder. Depricated in latest UI. Use 1 when setting this value.

id.description: Folder ID. Must match ID in path

inheritPermissions.description: Whether the folder should inherit permissions from its parent (default: true)

inheritSecretPolicy.description: Whether the folder should inherit the secret policy.  Defaults to true unless creating a root folder.

parentFolderId.description: The ID of this folder's parent folder.

secretPolicyId.description: The id of the Secret Policy that sets security and other settings on secrets contained within the folder.
